However, in this project structure, the locale file is in a subfolder (he/), so the relative path to the image (which is in the same folder as the English index.md) must be ../image.webp. Wait, looking at the prompt: 'Locale files live one folder deeper than English... Any inherited local image... must start with ../'. The candidate correctly followed this. My suggestion was wrong based on the prompt's specific constraint.
